name: whatsapp-relay
description: Keep one local WhatsApp connection alive, read recent messages and received attachments from a bounded temporary cache, and send explicit text without URL previews.

interface.longDescription: An experimental WhatsApp relay using a persistent same-user service and local whatsmeow sidecar for QR authentication, seven-day bounded message and media caching across Codex requests, chat lookup, explicit attachment inspection, and explicit text sending. It does not let WhatsApp control Codex or respond automatically.
defaultPrompt: Link my WhatsApp account and verify the auth status
Find a WhatsApp contact or group by name
Read recent messages from a WhatsApp chat
Inspect a received WhatsApp audio, image, video, or document
Send an explicit WhatsApp text message to a contact or group
